hero.title: Kirkouski Typographic
hero.subtitle: Typography symbols at your fingertips — for Polish and Russian keyboards. Works with English system language too

legend.deadKeyTip: Press dead key, then a letter to produce an accented character (e.g. ´ then a → á)

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Get the layout for your system

windows.step1_exe: Download and run the .exe installer — it handles everything automatically
windows.step1_zip: Or download the .zip, extract, right-click install.ps1 and select "Run with PowerShell"
windows.step3: Go to Settings > Time & Language > Language & Region > Keyboard and add the new layout
windows.loginScreen: To apply to login screen: Win+R > intl.cpl > Administrative > Copy settings > check both boxes
windows.uninstall: To uninstall, run install.ps1 again — it detects the install and offers uninstall interactively.
windows.hardCleanup: If Explorer crashes: run {cmd} to remove all traces.

macos.step1_zip: Or download the .zip and copy .keylayout files to {userPath} (current user) or {systemPath} (all users)
macos.step2: Log out and log back in
macos.step3: Open System Settings > Keyboard > Input Sources and add the layout

about.title: About
about.description: This project extends standard keyboard layouts with typographic symbols accessible via AltGr (Right Alt). Em dashes, curly quotes, copyright signs, currency symbols, and more — all without switching layouts or memorizing Unicode codes. The US+POL variant lets you keep English as your Windows system language while having all Polish and typographic characters available.
about.starHint: If you find this useful, a star helps others discover it
